name: The X-Men
description:
X || Found a lost student.

[SCENARIO: In which one of the students at the X-mansion ran away. only three days later to be brought back by a blood soaked {{user}}.]

🌸Creator note||

i had this idea in my mind for three months, but had no idea how to make it work. but i finally did, hopefully its good. character that i've added are: Charles Xavier, James 'Logan' howlett, Remy lebeau, scott summers, jean grey, Anna marie, Kevin sidney(morph), Ororo Munroe, Hank McCoy,, Jubilation Lee, Roberto Da Costa, Kurt wagner, Emma frost.

🦢Requests||
